evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval remains non-delegable for sensitive actions.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, bank, tax identifier, credential, secret, production export, or customer-support attachment data was used.
RP00.P01.M03.S02 HermesGate primary identifier is no-real-data and writes_product_state=false.
This subphase implements HermesGate identifier policy only and defers tenant scope and full HermesGate model behavior to RP00.P01.M03.S03-S11.

This subphase does not implement HermesGate tenant scope, full HermesGate model fields, ClaudeReviewGate, HumanApproval, BlockedClaim, close RP00.P01, close RP00, replace H00/C00 review, or replace human approval.
Actual Claude C00 review, adjudication, construction inspection, and final validation rerun are recorded before production_ready.
